title: aster brachyphyllus
intro: Aster brachyphyllus, also known as Short-leaved Aster, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aster brachyphyllus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Aster brachyphyllus include infusions, decoctions, and dried extracts, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
